lines: Horace pins a relief schedule to the board with one grease-black nail.
"Do not lean there. The board is sound, but the wall behind it has opinions."

choices.label: Have Horace trace the old return
Mark the relief return for Noa

effects.log: Horace marks a reduced local loop that can bypass the north feed.

choices.label: Give Horace the width of the board

lines: His nail follows a faded line around the north feed.
"Cut here. Open the return by hand. The balance gear lost half its teeth, so every valve needs a person who knows when metal is lying."

choices.label: Ask what the smaller loop costs

lines: "Less water reaches the camp, but the buried answer reaches none of it. Put both facts on Noa’s plan."

choices.label: Let Horace inspect the return seam
